heading: Today
text: Partly sunny, decreasing smoke and humidity. A stray shower. Warm.

heading: Wednesday Night
text: Mostly clear, patchy valley fog. Some smoke late. Cooler.

heading: Thursday
text: Sun through smoke. A rising chance of afternoon showers and storms north.
temperature: Upper 70s to upper 80s, north to south

heading: Friday
temperature: Upper 60s to mid 70s north, upper 70s to mid 80s south
